reviewer: agent matrix pass (headless Chrome, real download+run, light+dark, mobile+desktop) — revision 1

rubric.evidence: Agent verdict — real onnxruntime-web@1.21 run in a Web Worker on the cats sample returned the raw [1,84,8400] dense head; argmax+floor decode gave 54 candidates, client NMS at IoU 0.45 kept 4 (cat 94%, cat 93%, remote 72%, couch 62%). 199-201 ms WASM. conformance (wasm, headless no-GPU): 2✓ — loads-clean=pass, calls-real-inference=pass. screenshots: /tmp/w15b-scratch/shots/yolo11-detection/results-dark.png, reports/responsive/screens/yolo11-detection/desktop.png+mobile.png
rubric.notes: Distinct from YOLOv10 (NMS-free): this model requires argmax over 80 classes + Non-Max-Suppression.

rubric.evidence: Agent verdict — output tensor dims [1,84,8400] confirmed (python onnx inspect + browser run). Decoded boxes are semantically correct: same scene as the YOLOv10 demo returns 2×cat + remote + couch, pixel-accurate boxes drawn on the canvas, scores in [0,1]. NMS pills show 8400 anchors → 54 above floor → N above score → K kept, updating live with the sliders. conformance: io-shape-semantic=manual (agent verdict recorded).

conformance (wasm, headless no-GPU): 5✓ — declares-model-id=pass (webnn/yolo11n linked to card), declares-task=pass (object-detection), declares-backend=pass (WebAssembly), declares-quantisation=pass (fp32), inference-off-main-thread=pass (new Worker in yolo11.js). At-a-glance also states output tensor, opset 19, AGPL-3.0.

Agent verdict — fresh profile shows 'Download model (~10 MB)'; clicking it streams progress and the shared loader auto-inits to 'Model ready' (loaderState=ready) with a 'Clear cached model' control. ORT weights fetched THROUGH Cache Storage at the HF /webnn/yolo11n/ URL so a returning visit is cache-scannable → auto-init, no re-download. conformance: shared-auto-init-loader=pass, auto-init-on-cached=manual.

Agent verdict — streamed download progress; Retry surfaced on load failure via the shared loader; detection errors go to a .status.err region; ORT bytes cached in Cache Storage for offline reuse; the webcam page has an honest 'no camera' fallback offering a sample image. Runs on the WASM path with no GPU (headless no-GPU produced real boxes). conformance: live-status-region=pass, errors-on-the-page=pass; honest-progress-retry-offline + runs-without-webgpu-fallback = manual.

Agent verdict — Detect button, live score-threshold slider, live NMS IoU slider (both re-filter+re-NMS the cached candidates with no re-inference), 'show suppressed duplicates' checkbox (ghost boxes), keyboard-operable dropzone + sample thumbnails (Enter/Space), webcam Start/Stop, practical focus dropdown, and multi-model object-pick buttons all operable. conformance: controls-operable=manual.

Agent verdict — every visible box comes from the on-device onnxruntime-web run + client NMS (verified real output: cat 94%/93%, remote 72%, couch 62%; multi-model crop → real ViT labels). No canned result anywhere. conformance: no-fake-output=manual.

conformance (wasm, headless no-GPU): 2✓ — images-have-alt=pass, buttons-have-names=pass. role=status aria-live loader; labelled sliders with <output>; keyboard-operable dropzone + sample thumbnails; the NMS checkbox has a wrapping label.

Agent verdict — desktop 1280×800 (light+dark) and mobile 360×740 DPR3 both render with no horizontal overflow, legible text, wrapped at-a-glance table, and ≥44px controls; responsive-check programmatic pass (overflow ≤1px, 0 clipped, console+network clean) on both classes; screenshots reviewed. conformance: responsive-desktop=pass, responsive-mobile=pass, parity-both-classes=manual.

Agent verdict — all inference (letterbox on OffscreenCanvas + session.run + dense-head decode) runs in a Web Worker; NMS is a light client-side pass on ≤a few hundred cached candidates; the live-webcam loop is requestAnimationFrame-paced and auto-pauses when the tab is hidden. Main-thread eval stayed responsive during load; 0 console errors. conformance: inp-stays-low=manual.

guidanceConsulted.query: keep INP low move work off main thread web worker
guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Yield the main thread / offload heavy work; keep interaction handlers short.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — all ORT inference + letterbox + head-decode run in a Web Worker; ImageBitmap frames are transferred (zero-copy). The interactive sliders only re-run a light client-side NMS on cached candidates, never re-inference.
guidanceConsulted.evidence: headless: detect 199-201 ms in the worker, main-thread eval responsive, 0 console errors

guidanceConsulted.query: responsive control panel layout without horizontal overflow
guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Use flexbox/grid with flex-wrap and intrinsic sizing so control rows reflow without overflow.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — slider rows use flex + flex-wrap; the canvas is inline-size:100% with block-size:auto; the at-a-glance table wraps. responsive-check found overflow ≤1px on both classes.

guidanceConsulted.query: accessible range slider and live status region
guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Label every control; announce state in a live region; keep tap targets adequate.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — role=status aria-live loader, labelled score+IoU sliders with <output>, keyboard-operable dropzone + sample thumbnails, obj-btn min-block-size 44px.

guidanceConsulted.query: real-time webcam canvas overlay without blocking
guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Drive the live loop with requestAnimationFrame (auto-throttled when hidden) and stop tracks on stop.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — wild/index.html loop guards on document.hidden + video.readyState and stops getUserMedia tracks on Stop.
guidanceConsulted.evidence: wild page loads clean; loop is rAF-paced with a visibilitychange status

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Cross-document view transitions for catalogue↔page nav.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — @view-transition navigation:auto in the shared public/styles.css.

openQuestions: Could a WebGPU execution-provider path (honest WASM fallback retained) speed up the dense head on capable devices?

followUpGoals.goal: Add a side-by-side YOLO11-vs-YOLOv10 demo on the same image that highlights the NMS-free vs NMS difference directly.
Add a WebGPU execution-provider fast path for yolo11-detection with an honest WASM fallback.

summary: Revision-1 agent matrix pass for yolo11-detection: real ~10 MB download + on-device onnxruntime-web run verified in headless Chrome (raw [1,84,8400] head → 54 candidates → NMS → 4 boxes: cat 94%/93%, remote 72%, couch 62%, ~200 ms WASM). The live score + NMS-IoU sliders make the Non-Max-Suppression step (the whole contrast with the NMS-free YOLOv10) legible and interactive. Light+dark and mobile+desktop screenshots reviewed (no overflow, legible, ≥44px controls); all 5 pages load clean. 14/14 auto-checkable conformance assertions pass; 9 manual-evidenced dimensions carry the agent verdicts above.
